Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot JarLauncher class path to match the package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Dockerfile.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException at runtime because the class org.springframework.boot.loader.JarLauncher was moved to org.springframework.boot.loader.launch.JarLauncher in Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.13 to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is not compatible with Java 21 features and requires migration to Spring Boot 3.x for continued support and compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 21 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded Spring Boot 3.x stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version from 1.18.30 to 1.18.46 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may have compatibility issues with Java 21 bytecode or annotation processing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to ensure proper integration between Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, Lombok and MapStruct may not interact correctly, leading to compilation errors in generated code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add <release>${java.version}</release> to maven-compiler-plugin configuration to enforce Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the compiler may not target Java 21, leading to compatibility issues with the upgraded JDK.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Bu.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Bu.why_exists: javax.annotation.Generated is removed from the JDK in Java 11+ and not present in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 projects without explicit dependency; using jakarta.annotation.Generated ensures compatibility with the Jakarta namespace.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Da.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation import with jakarta.annotation to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE namespace migration.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Da.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile without the jakarta replacement.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Mo.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Mo.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.general_idea: Migrate JPA id annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.general_idea: Migrate JPA lob annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.general_idea: Migrate JPA id annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile or link against Spring Boot 3 dependencies which use jakarta.servlet.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ui.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet.http does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ut.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ut.why_exists: Classes in javax.servlet package are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist' errors on Spring Boot 3/JDK 21.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot 3 property for maximum HTTP request header size.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.why_exists: The property 'server.max-http-header-size' was removed in Spring Boot 3; using it results in a configuration binding error or ignored setting.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Migrate HTTP encoding configuration to Spring Boot 3 servlet properties.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.why_exists: The properties 'spring.http.encoding.charset' and 'spring.http.encoding.enabled' were removed in Spring Boot 3; using them results in configuration binding errors.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.before:
spring:
    http:
        encoding:
            charset: UTF-8
            enabled: true

src/main/templates/org/isaqb/onlinetrain.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the Java EE javax namespace to the Jakarta EE jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/templates/org/isaqb/onlinetrain.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, causing a compilation error due to missing class.

src/test/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/pa.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
src/test/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/pa.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and List.getFirst() is the preferred API.

src/test/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/pa.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility in helper method.
src/test/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/pa.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and List.getFirst() is the preferred API.
